description.value: Insulated box body with climate control for perishable delivery. Built on Fernhay eAV electric cutaway chassis. Chassis designed and manufactured by Fernhay. Ideal for grocery and perishable last-mile delivery for fleets such as Amazon Fresh, Whole Foods, HyVee, Kroger, Walmart, Target, and Kernel.
Fernhay eAV electric cutaway chassis — designed and manufactured by Fernhay

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: Fully electric cutaway chassis platform. Includes powertrain, battery pack, frame, suspension, steering, and braking systems. Designed and manufactured by Fernhay.

description.value: Insulated composite panel box body with thermal barrier for climate-controlled delivery

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: Insulated composite panel box body with thermal barrier. Includes vapor barrier, sealed joints, and insulated door seals. Designed for perishable grocery delivery for fleets such as Amazon Fresh, Whole Foods, HyVee, Kroger, Walmart, Target, and Kernel.

description.value: Select refrigeration configuration for climate-controlled delivery

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: Maintains 33–40°F for fresh grocery and produce delivery. Ideal for perishable last-mile operations for fleets such as Amazon Fresh, Whole Foods, HyVee, Kroger, Walmart, Target, and Kernel.
Maintains -10 to 0°F for frozen goods delivery. Designed for frozen grocery and perishable transport for fleets such as Amazon Fresh, Whole Foods, HyVee, Kroger, Walmart, Target, and Kernel.

Independent chilled and frozen compartments with adjustable divider wall. Supports simultaneous fresh and frozen delivery for fleets such as Amazon Fresh, Whole Foods, HyVee, Kroger, Walmart, Target, and Kernel.

description.value: Select interior shelving configuration for the insulated box body

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: No interior shelving. Empty insulated cargo area for custom racking or bulk storage.
Adjustable shelving system for totes and bags. Designed for organized grocery delivery operations for fleets such as Amazon Fresh, Whole Foods, HyVee, Kroger, Walmart, Target, and Kernel.

Open floor plan for pallet or bulk delivery. No shelving installed — maximizes cargo volume for large or palletized loads for fleets such as Amazon Fresh, Whole Foods, HyVee, Kroger, Walmart, Target, and Kernel.
Standard white exterior finish. Included in base price.
Custom exterior color matched to customer specifications. Includes fleet branding color matching.

description.value: Select a charging solution for your vehicle

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: Standard Level 2 AC charging unit for overnight depot charging. Ideal for fleet operations with predictable schedules.
DC fast charging unit enabling rapid charging at commercial depots. 80% charge in under 1 hour.
